name: All American Pet Company, Inc.
summary: All American Pet Company, Inc. develops and markets pet wellness products in the United States. The company offers alcohol-free anti-bacterial dog cleaner products, such as pet wipes and sprays under the Pawtizer name; vitamin and mineral bars under the CHOMPBar brand name; and nutritional dog food bar under the Nutra Bars brand. It also intends to offer Mutt pet food product; and Chewies dog snacks. All American Pet Company, Inc. was founded in 2003 and is based in Los Angeles, California.
